meeting.track_notes: Turf. Summer course 2800m in circumference with 600m run-in. Winter course 2700m with 450m run-in. Races up to 1200m testing straight course (1200m races are occasionally run round the turn, starting on the Summer course and ending on the Winter course); beyond 1200m anti-clockwise round turn. DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets KENILWORTH WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: AQUAE CALIDAE showed some promise on debut when beaten by a good horse. He should go one better this time. COPPER HEAD was slowly away and showed inexperience on debut so is capable of improvement. ANOTHER HERO is improving and can get involved with the finish once again. GODRIC GRYFFINDOR has not been disgraced in all three starts and can be a threat with Richard Fourie riding. LIKE DYNAMITE and LE SOLEIL are making their debuts so monitor the betting on them.

races.race_name: JOIN THE RACE COAST TURF CLUB MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A competitive looking race. CAPTAIN’S ANGEL proved a disappointment in his second start. He is still learning about racing and would not be a surprise winner this time around. Sta- ble companion HERO’S JOURNEY has hit the crossbar twice in just four starts and is clearly not out of it. Another Vaughan Marshall runner also has claims. IT’SGOOD IT’SNICE ran a cracker on debut and could score. SPINNAKER only found one better on his debut and should be a big runner in this race. Stable companion YOU MADE ME LOOK will prefer this distance and could earn some money. MADE IN CHELSEA has run well twice already and can make the frame again.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: NOON DAY GUN has struck form this year and was a very easy winner of his latest start. He beat a number of these rivals and could follow up. FORT YUKON is holding form but does seem held by that rival. RED DAWN is unreliable but could earn some minor money. PACIFIC WATERS showed what she is capable of with a good win but this is a tougher race. SIGNOR DANTE and GIVETHATMANABELLS are clearly capable of better than their last runs and should be lively dangers. DEVIL A SAINT is not reliable but might play a minor role.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A tricky leg of the Pick 6 as a number of the runners are likely to improve. LAVA STRIKE showed improvement when a runner-up and could go one better. COFFEE CRUNCH pro- duced a fair debut and could score for Muzi Yeni. MONTICELLO and LOVE FROM AFAR could be better than their most recent runs would suggest. SPURIOUS showed improvement last time out and is improving so must also be given some respect.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: LOVING PRAGUE is improving and could be ready for a winning turn. WINTER PEARL remains in good form and can contest the finish. KLIPTOWN struggled on a soft track last time out but could improve with blinkers carded for him. KELP FOREST is not reliable but is capable of a victory when in the right mood. MOODY BLUE has held form and is not out of it. FAST TRAIN and OCTOBER STORM are both unreliable but should be included in all Pick 6’s.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A very open looking race. ERIC LIDDELL showed improvement with a solid win last time out and could follow up under a penalty. Stable companion SONG TO THE MOON is not reliable but is also not out of it. TUNGUSKA seems better than a modest last run. GENTLEMAN JOE is consistent and will fight it out again. SCOTTISH LINKS has not been reliable but is com- petitive in races like this. FORT LIAM is holding form and can make the frame. TOTHEMOONANDBACK has a place chance if at his best.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Snaith Racing have a decent hand in this race. FUTURE FREE is still improving and could be the pick of them but he can expect stiff challenges from both PRAIRIE DAWN and MAGIC VERSE. PAY THE PALACE showed some improvement last time out and could finish in the money. OTTO LUYKEN is weighted to run but might need to find a few lengths to beat some improving younger rivals. TIME FOR LOVE did not show her best last time out but can earn some money.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MUTINY IN HEAVEN is improving and looks ready to score. CHARLIE BUCKET is threatening a first victory and should fight out the finish once again. QUIET PLACE is not reliable but could get into the mix of things. FREQUENT TRAVELLER, READY FOR THE ROAD and FATE OF PACE are all capable of earning some minor money.
